stimulus:
Welcome to our experiment!

In each trial, you will see a shape. Describe the shape as accurately as you can in the provided textbox.

Your description can be as long or as short as you’d like, from just a few words up to a whole paragraph if you feel that is necessary.

The next page will ask for participant ID.

After all the trials have been completed, the last page will ask for some demographic information.

Once you are ready to start, click any button.
